hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if resolved backlog cards must retain the exact same learning_item as state verdict pointers and the retained learning_log.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` could pass even if a kept or rejected backlog item omitted `learning_item` entirely or drifted from `state.last_kept_change`, `state.last_rejected_change`, or `learning_log`, so recovery could treat one ratchet as multiple conflicting lessons. After the ratchet, the verifier fails resolved backlog cards missing `learning_item` or carrying a text mismatch against the state verdict pointers or retained learning log, and the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if the verifier rejects resolved backlog cards with missing or drifting learning_item text while the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Resolved systems-optimizer backlog cards must retain the exact learning_item logged in state and learning_log, or recovery can replay one ratchet with split lessons across surfaces.
